title: Nukes lab boss 'left secret UFO stash' for son — with '100% proof' of top-secret studies
description: A dead Los Alamos nuclear chief allegedly left his son secret files containing proof of a classified US government study into UFOs and alien technology

title: UFO linked scientist warned 'my life is in danger' before death as 11th mystery case emerges
description: Amy Eskridge, 34, committed suicide four years ago and her case has now drawn scrutiny. Eskridge died from a self-inflicted gunshot to the head in Huntsville, Alabama on June 11, 2022

title: Amy Eskridge ‘Suicide’: UFO Scientist’s Death Part of Federal Probe Into 11 ‘Mysterious Cases’
description: US President Donald Trump has confirmed a federal probe into the mysterious deaths of 11 US scientists, including researcher Amy Eskridge. Eskridge, who studied anti-gravity, died in 2022 after warning her life was in danger. Other recent cases involve experts in nuclear fusion and NASA staff, sparking concerns regarding a potential conspiracy.

title: Eight UFO, nuclear physics researchers die or go missing in US over past three years
description: The last person on the list is former US Air Force retired Major General William McCasland, who went missing on February 27, 2026

title: Scientist with UFO knowledge who was working on a gravity device said her life was in danger. Now, she's the eleventh scientist to be found dead under mysterious circumstances [Followup]
